updatePassword.introBar: Safeguard your presence online with professional encryption

about.hero_text: ra'edat is a pioneering platform dedicated to unleashing the transformative potential of Arab women within the orange economy.
about.title: Title
about.vision_text: To ignite the creative potential of Arab women in the orange economy, fostering a vibrant community of innovative thinkers and changemakers who inspire social progress and economic development.
about.mission_text: To empower Arab women by providing tools, mentorship, and opportunities to thrive in the orange economy.

features.post_content: Create posts, articles, polls, events, and courses.
features.groups: Build community groups and sub-groups for organisations.
features.marketplace: Support for creating a branded e-marketplace.
features.mobile_app: Native app available for Android and iOS devices.
features.gamification: Enhance gamification features to boost engagement.

home.desc_initiative: ra'edat is an innovative initiative dedicated to fostering collaborations among members and organisations, empowering them to achieve shared goals and build meaningful partnerships within the creative economy, more specifically, the orange economy.

community.title: A Creative Community
community.description: The platform will harness women's potential by integrating the orange economy into our pillars, with an approach to tailoring content and operations to empower Arab women while fostering economic growth.
community.pillars_sub: Five integrated pillars designed to empower Arab women through the orange creative economy in ra'edat.
community.individuals_sub: This platform is dedicated to every ambitious and creative woman who never stops growing.

individuals.personal_growth_text: Access to tailored educational resources, workshops, and expert mentorship enhances skills critical for success in the creative economy.
individuals.networking_text: Connect with like-minded women and industry leaders to share experiences and collaborate on projects.
individuals.creative_expression_text: Engage in a community that celebrates and promotes unique talents through various initiatives, including the souq ra'edat marketplace.

communities.empowerment_text: By investing in women's entrepreneurship, ra'edat strengthens local economies and fosters innovation across the creative sector.
communities.heritage_text: The platform promotes cultural pride and sustainable economic growth by highlighting the achievements and contributions of women within their communities.
communities.growth_text: Workshops, panel discussions, and events cultivate a collaborative spirit and encourage knowledge exchange among members.

community.users_title: ra'edat caters to a wide range of users, including:
community.users_sub: Whether you're building a business or sharing an idea — ra'edat is your perfect place.

partners.heroSubtitle: Collaborating with visionaries to create impact

contact.address: Al Badi' Building, Road 711, Block 207, Building 453, Apartment 22, P.O. Box 3294, Muharraq, Bahrain
contact.form_title: We’re happy to hear from you
contact.form_desc: Fill out the form and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
